item.title: The nonclassical weirdness of electron spin
item.description: A brief look at electron spin and why it behaves in nonclassical ways.

media:content.media:title: The nonclassical weirdness of electron spin
media:content.media:description: A brief look at electron spin and why it behaves in nonclassical ways.

item.title: What does fried water taste like?
item.description: In this video I deep fry water and then eat it. I show you how to make edible membranes and show you the science behind how they work.

media:content.media:title: What does fried water taste like?
media:content.media:description: In this video I deep fry water and then eat it. I show you how to make edible membranes and show you the science behind how they work.

item.title: House plant sings "Billie Jean" when i squeeze it
item.description: In this video I make a piano out of bananas and make a house plant and some lettuce sing Michael Jackson's "Billie Jean." I use a cool little device called a Makey, Makey to do this. I use the opportunity to talk about how transistors are making it work by showing a simple circuit made from snap circuits. Then I show my skills and play Mary Had a Little Lamb on the bananas.

media:content.media:title: House plant sings "Billie Jean" when i squeeze it
media:content.media:description: In this video I make a piano out of bananas and make a house plant and some lettuce sing Michael Jackson's "Billie Jean." I use a cool little device called a Makey, Makey to do this. I use the opportunity to talk about how transistors are making it work by showing a simple circuit made from snap circuits. Then I show my skills and play Mary Had a Little Lamb on the bananas.

item.title: How this sand resists water
item.description: A science experiment explores sand that resists water and what happens when it is treated differently.

media:content.media:title: How this sand resists water
media:content.media:description: A science experiment explores sand that resists water and what happens when it is treated differently.

item.title: An omnidirectional display in real life

media:content.media:title: An omnidirectional display in real life

item.title: Static electricity has memory
item.description: The experiment that proved static electricity has a memory

media:content.media:title: Static electricity has memory
media:content.media:description: The experiment that proved static electricity has a memory

item.title: Why do ladybugs follow your drawings?
item.description: In this video I show you how a lady bug will follow a pen line and even avoid a permanent marker line. I talk about why it might be doing this odd behavior.

media:content.media:title: Why do ladybugs follow your drawings?
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how a lady bug will follow a pen line and even avoid a permanent marker line. I talk about why it might be doing this odd behavior.

item.title: Holographic rainbows on chocolate
item.description: In this video I talk about diffraction gratings and how they work. I show you how you can use them to make diffraction patterns on chocolate or other shiny materials.

media:content.media:title: Holographic rainbows on chocolate
media:content.media:description: In this video I talk about diffraction gratings and how they work. I show you how you can use them to make diffraction patterns on chocolate or other shiny materials.

item.title: This shape meanders instead of rolls
item.description: In this video I show you the sphericon and talk about how it works. I also show you a homemade version of the sphericon you can make at home using coins.

media:content.media:title: This shape meanders instead of rolls
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you the sphericon and talk about how it works. I also show you a homemade version of the sphericon you can make at home using coins.
